author: Alex S
subject: v2.10.0
body: # [2.10.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.9.0...v2.10.0) (2018-08-08) ### Bug Fixes * **release:** provide interactive TTY for npm publish ([#3053](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3053)) ([ede9460](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/ede9460)) ### Features * Implement API ([#3042](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/3042)) ([1510a94](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/1510a94))
